notes: Default model. Reasoning-optimised — excellent for structured financial logic and multi-step valuation work. Fast enough for interactive use.
Higher-quality reasoning for complex thesis work and detailed DCF builds. Slower than 7B but noticeably better at multi-step financial analysis.
Fastest option. Best for quick earnings summaries and draft investment memos where speed matters more than depth.
Well-rounded Llama model. Strong prose quality — great for investment memos and sector comparison narratives.
